title: taraxacum obliquiforme
intro: Taraxacum obliquiforme, also known as a type of dandelion, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Asteraceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate digestion, reduce inflammation, and act as a diuretic. The health benefits of Taraxacum obliquiforme include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve liver function, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Taraxacum obliquiforme often include tea, tincture, and capsules, which can be used to alleviate various health issues, including digestive problems and skin conditions.
